name: color-demo
description: Interactive demo of run-p colored labels (PR #222)

scripts.all-tasks: alpha beta gamma delta epsilon zeta eta theta iota kappa lambda mu nu xi omicron pi rho sigma tau upsilon
scripts.demo: node ../bin/run-p/index.js -l alpha beta gamma delta epsilon zeta eta theta iota kappa lambda mu nu xi omicron pi rho sigma tau upsilon
scripts.demo-16: node ../bin/run-p/index.js -l --color-mode 16   alpha beta gamma delta epsilon zeta eta theta iota kappa lambda mu nu xi omicron pi rho sigma tau upsilon
scripts.demo-256: node ../bin/run-p/index.js -l --color-mode 256  alpha beta gamma delta epsilon zeta eta theta iota kappa lambda mu nu xi omicron pi rho sigma tau upsilon
scripts.demo-none: node ../bin/run-p/index.js -l --color-mode none alpha beta gamma delta epsilon zeta eta theta iota kappa lambda mu nu xi omicron pi rho sigma tau upsilon
scripts.demo-force-none: FORCE_COLOR=0 node ../bin/run-p/index.js -l alpha beta gamma delta epsilon zeta eta theta iota kappa lambda mu nu xi omicron pi rho sigma tau upsilon
scripts.demo-force-16: FORCE_COLOR=1 node ../bin/run-p/index.js -l alpha beta gamma delta epsilon zeta eta theta iota kappa lambda mu nu xi omicron pi rho sigma tau upsilon
scripts.demo-force-256: FORCE_COLOR=2 node ../bin/run-p/index.js -l alpha beta gamma delta epsilon zeta eta theta iota kappa lambda mu nu xi omicron pi rho sigma tau upsilon
scripts.demo-force-16m: FORCE_COLOR=3 node ../bin/run-p/index.js -l alpha beta gamma delta epsilon zeta eta theta iota kappa lambda mu nu xi omicron pi rho sigma tau upsilon
